{"success":true,"response":"I have completed all steps of process J09B:

1. ✅ Created J09B_temp table from decision_table with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to J09B_temp
3. ✅ Applied rules:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if less than 3 EQUNR per HAUS, else "EVU"
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 to "EVU" (no rows affected)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 500-599 to "EVU" (no rows affected)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 900-999 to "EVU" (7 rows affected)
   - Set CITY1/CITY2 = Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU" (no rows affected)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table on ANLAGE = Installation
5. ✅ Joined with sales_master and net_master tables on EQUNR
6. ✅ Compared sales and net data - kept sales data when available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for EQUNRs with both 2023 and 2024 records where ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" (792 rows affected)
8. ✅ Exported MANDATORY_READING entries to J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv (792 rows)
9. ✅ Sent MANDATORY_READING file to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. ✅ Exported non-MANDATORY_READING entries to J09B.csv (19388 rows)
11. ✅ Sent J09B file to meter.readings@evu.com
12. ✅ Deleted temporary table J09B_temp

Process J09B has been completed successfully.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
I have completed all steps of process J09B:

1. ✅ Created J09B_temp table from decision_table with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to J09B_temp
3. ✅ Applied rules:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if less than 3 EQUNR per HAUS, else "EVU"
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 to "EVU" (no rows affected)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 500-599 to "EVU" (no rows affected)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 900-999 to "EVU" (7 rows affected)
   - Set CITY1/CITY2 = Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU" (no rows affected)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table on ANLAGE = Installation
5. ✅ Joined with sales_master and net_master tables on EQUNR
6. ✅ Compared sales and net data - kept sales data when available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for EQUNRs with both 2023 and 2024 records where ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" (792 rows affected)
8. ✅ Exported MANDATORY_READING entries to J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv (792 rows)
9. ✅ Sent MANDATORY_READING file to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. ✅ Exported non-MANDATORY_READING entries to J09B.csv (19388 rows)
11. ✅ Sent J09B file to meter.readings@evu.com
12. ✅ Deleted temporary table J09B_temp

Process J09B has been completed successfully.

kwargs.content:
Process rule 'J09B' has been executed successfully! 

Here's a summary of what was completed:

**Process Steps Completed:**
1. ✅ Created temporary table J09B_temp from decision_table with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the temporary table
3. ✅ Applied business rules including:
   - Setting ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" or "EVU" based on EQUNR counts per HAUS
   - Setting HOUSE_NUM1 values for specific ranges (500-599, 900-999)
   - Setting CITY1/CITY2 values for Wiblingwerde and Breckerfeld
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table on ANLAGE = Installation
5. ✅ Joined with sales_master and net_master tables on EQUNR
6. ✅ Compared sales and net data, prioritizing sales data when available
7. ✅ Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for 792 rows meeting specific criteria
8. ✅ Exported MANDATORY_READING entries to J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv (792 rows) and sent to mandatory.reading@provider.com
9. ✅ Exported remaining entries to J09B.csv (19,388 rows) and sent to meter.readings@evu.com
10. ✅ Cleaned up by deleting temporary table J09B_temp

The process completed successfully with all data exports and email notifications delivered as expected.
